TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bob Arnzen nalecuhan i Covington, Kentucky, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Arnzen i 1969 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 8 ku uwac atu silsil 103, namapili' tu nu San Detroit Pistons putiput. 11 bulad 3 demiad, 1947 a mihca, Bob Arnzen, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob arnzən nar~ɾəʦuħan i ʦo*iŋton, kəntuʦkj, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bob arnzən i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ ***, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu san dətroit pistons putiput. ** bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob arnzən, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Bob Arnzen nalecuhan i Covington, Kentucky, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Arnzen i 1969 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 8 ku uwac atu silsil 103, namapili' tu nu San Detroit Pistons putiput. 11 bulad 3 demiad, 1947 a mihca, Bob Arnzen, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob arnzən nar~ɾəʦuħan i ʦo*iŋton, kəntuʦkj, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bob arnzən i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ ***, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu san dətroit pistons putiput. ** bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob arnzən, miunduaj.
